ocr_findings.description: The superscript ruby annotation 'イフ' (reading aid) above 'if' in the image is not captured in OCR — acceptable as ruby annotations are typically not transcribed.

reviewer_notes: Page covers 順次処理 and 選択処理とif, including the if-endif syntax block and a プログラム例 code block. All prose, the 書式 code block, and the three bullet points explaining if syntax are accurately captured. No significant errors; the missing ruby annotation is cosmetic only.
